rawAssistant: Another brave soul willing to venture into the wilds of Hollowfen, eh? I see you're on the north road now – the misty dawn is always a good time to spot something worth your while. Be careful, though - those lowland glows can be treacherous if not studied properly; what's your take on these strange light sources?
